summary: PW vs Claude SI Table Feature - All tests pass. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - PW vs Claude SI table with 8 rows (4 within + 4 combined), SI Rating Calibration table correctly removed, Inter-Model Agreement section shows 3 tables side by side.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PW vs Claude SI table feature fully tested. The /api/si-rating-stats endpoint returns pw_vs_claude_si array with 8 rows (4 within-model + 4 combined), pw_vs_si.within_model with claude/gpt/gemini keys, and pw_vs_si.overall with 4 methods (raw_wr, reg_wr, bt, trueskill). The /api/model-correlation endpoint returns pw_inter_model with 3 rows and 4 methods each including TrueSkill. Frontend renders at /correlation route with data-testid='inter-model-section' containing 3 tables side by side: pw-inter-model-table, si-inter-model-table, pw-vs-claude-si-table. The SI Rating Calibration table (data-testid='si-model-comparison') has been correctly REMOVED from SiRatingSection.jsx.

test_cases: Returns pw_vs_claude_si array with 8 rows
pw_vs_claude_si entries have comparison, type (within/combined), method, rho, n fields
4 within rows (Claude-only PW with Raw WR, Reg WR, BT, TrueSkill)
4 combined rows (Combined PW with Raw WR, Reg WR, BT, TrueSkill)
Methods appear in correct order: raw_wr, reg_wr, bt, trueskill
pw_vs_si.within_model has claude, gpt, gemini keys
pw_vs_si.overall has 4 methods
Returns pw_inter_model array with 3 rows
Each row has pair and methods object
Each methods object has raw_wr, reg_wr, bt, trueskill
TrueSkill column has valid rho values
Section visible at data-testid='inter-model-section'
Contains 3 tables in grid layout (side by side)
PW Inter-Model table at data-testid='pw-inter-model-table'
SI Inter-Model table at data-testid='si-inter-model-table'
PW vs Claude SI table at data-testid='pw-vs-claude-si-table'
Table has 8 data rows (4 within + 4 combined)
Separator row between within and combined sections
Contains 'Claude-only' (within) rows
Contains 'Combined PW' rows
Best rho (0.852 for Combined PW TrueSkill) is highlighted
Table has 3 rows (one per model pair)
Shows Raw WR, Reg WR, BT, TrueSkill columns
data-testid='si-model-comparison' does NOT exist on page
Table correctly removed from SiRatingSection.jsx
